creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 156639
patch for astro/geographiclib (with measures for downloads.sourceforge.net)

FETCH_ENV+=HTTP_REFERER= is added for measures of the following size mismatch.
If it is not an issue, attachment 156201 is preferred.

# make -C /usr/ports/astro/geographiclib/ FETCH_ARGS=-Fprvv fetch               ===>  License MIT accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for geographiclib-1.41
===>   geographiclib-1.41 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> GeographicLib-1.41.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /home/tmp/ports/distfiles/GeographicLib.
